channel.title: Gguf on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gguf on Arrans github.io

item.title: quantumaikr/quant.cpp
item.description: LLM inference with 7x longer context. Pure C, zero dependencies. Lossless KV cache compression + single-header library.

item.title: LostRuins/koboldcpp
item.description: Run GGUF models easily with a KoboldAI UI. One File. Zero Install.

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: hybridgroup/yzma
item.description: Go with your own intelligence - Go applications that directly integrate llama.cpp for local inference using hardware acceleration.
